notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the kernel SRPM in CIQ LTS for Rocky Linux 9.2. It addresses 39 CVEs: CVE-2021-47505, CVE-2022-49840, CVE-2023-1252, CVE-2023-2176, CVE-2023-3567, and 34 more.
